seo.title: Spawnly | Premium Game Server Hosting
seo.description: High-performance game servers for Minecraft, Satisfactory, and more. Pay hourly, control everything.

hero.subtitle: Containerized hosting for Minecraft and Satisfactory. Experience zero-lag NVMe performance, fractional hourly billing, and absolute control via our custom-built management panel.

carousel.title: Deploy Your Next Adventure
carousel.drag_instruction: Drag left or right to explore

minecraft.desc: Instantly deploy high-performance servers with full plugin and modpack support.

satisfactory.desc: Build massive factories without lag. Optimized for continuous background processing.

rust.desc: Survive the wipe with extreme NVMe performance for seamless monument loading.

access.title: Raw Access & Control.
access.desc: Stop relying on FTP clients. Our built-in web file manager lets you edit configs, upload worlds, and manage mods directly from your browser. Pair that with our live WebSocket console to issue commands in real-time.

teams.title: Built for Teams.
teams.desc: Don't share your password. Use our advanced Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to invite friends or admins to your server. Grant them specific permissions like 'Start/Stop', 'Edit Files', or 'View Console' safely.

features.title: Everything you need to host.
features.subtitle: A comprehensive suite of tools built specifically for community leaders and game server admins.

billing.title: Fractional Hourly Billing
billing.desc: Top up credits via Stripe and pay strictly for the hours your server is online. Turn it off, and the meter stops instantly.

schedules.title: Automated Schedules
schedules.desc: Set up cron jobs to automatically restart your server, send broadcast commands to players, or trigger routine backups while you sleep.

mods.title: 1-Click Mod Manager
mods.desc: Deep integration with CurseForge and SteamCMD. Search, install, and update modpacks and server plugins with a single click.

world.title: World Management
world.desc: Upload your existing single-player saves directly to the cloud, or download your server's map to keep a local copy safe.

backups.title: Secure Backups
backups.desc: Never lose progress. Create manual restore points instantly, or rely on our automated backup system to keep your data safe.

isolation.title: Hard Isolation
isolation.desc: Every server runs in a dedicated Docker/Kubernetes container environment, guaranteeing your CPU and RAM are never throttled by noisy neighbors.

cta.title: Ready to start your community?
cta.subtitle: Create an account, add credits, and have your server online in less than 60 seconds.
